turns.content: What brings you in today?
Can barely breathe, doc. It's been three days and gettin' worse. Feel like I'm drownin' right now.
When did this start?
Started three days ago, I think. After I did some work around the house.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Here in my chest. Feels heavy, tight. Like someone's sittin' on me.
Have you had any fever or chills?
Nah, no fever. Just can't get air in.
What medications are you currently taking?
Got a water pill and somethin' for my heart. I... don't remember the names. The bottle's at home.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, high blood pressure. And they told me I got some heart problems, but I don't know much about all that.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Don't think so, doc. Never had any trouble with pills before.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
Nah. Just sat quiet, tried to rest. But it ain't helpin'. My wife made me come in.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Lying down makes it worse. Can't catch my breath flat. Sittin' up helps a little.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Can't even walk to the kitchen. Can't work. Nothin'. Just sittin' here scared.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I quit smokin' ten years back. Had a beer now and then, but not lately.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
My brother had a bad heart. Died from it a few years back.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. Never this bad. Felt kinda winded before, but nothin' like this. This is different.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, doc. Whatever you think. Just fix me so I can breathe.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physical? Eight, maybe nine. Emotionally... that's even worse, doc. Scared as hell.
Do you have any questions for me?
No questions, doc. Just do what you gotta do.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know, doc. Maybe my heart's actin' up. That's what I'm scared of. My brother went that way.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
Yeah... my ankles. They're swelled up like balloons. Been like that a few days too. Forgots to mention it.
